bead.title: Fuel-metered, cancel-aware query execution
bead.implemented_lane: coarse deterministic query-work admission at segment, dictionary-block, posting-block, and phrase-position boundaries

work_units: one sealed or Delta segment transition
one prefix-compressed sealed dictionary block or logical 16-term Delta dictionary block
one sealed posting block or logical 128-posting Delta block
one phrase candidate document admitted for position verification
contract.inner_loop_policy: no checkpoints occur inside posting unpack, BM25 scoring, or position-merge inner loops
contract.cancellation: every coarse checkpoint observes Cx cancellation and returns QuillIndexError::Cancelled with a stable phase
contract.fuel_exhaustion: QuillIndexError::QueryFuelExhausted reports the admitted total plus deterministic segment, dictionary-block, posting-block, and position-document counters
contract.determinism: queries whose conservative upper bound can exceed the budget execute the metered segment path serially, making the exhaustion point and progress tuple schedule-independent
contract.ordinary_fast_path: a conservative preflight upper bound disables atomic fuel accounting when the complete query is provably below budget; cancellation checks remain at coarse boundaries and ordinary sealed fan-out remains enabled
contract.configuration_identity: query_fuel_budget participates in the gauntlet Quill configuration hash

adversarial_proof.default_budget: both ranked and scoreless execution complete for the glob and phrase fixture queries without fuel exhaustion

cancellation_proof.result: all schedules observed typed cancellation, quiesced, passed oracles, and reported no invariant violations

qg6_no_regression.scope: normative QG-6 smoke slice query/identifier/k10/100k with the smoke corpus cap of 500 documents
qg6_no_regression.reason: QG-6 remains provisional and the full 20-cell matrix was not run; this same-worker before/after slice is the bead's checkpoint-overhead acceptance evidence
qg6_no_regression.environment: RCH_WORKER=ovh-a RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RUST_LOG=warn QUILL_PERF_SCALE=smoke QUILL_PERF_GATE=QG-6 QUILL_PERF_RUNS=10

invalidated_benchmark.command: QUILL_E49_SCALE=full QUILL_E49_ROUNDS=41 QUILL_E49_LIMIT=10 cargo bench -p frankensearch-quill --features bench-internals --profile release --bench segment_fanout_ab
invalidated_benchmark.failure: the untouched baseline fixture expected eight sealed segments, but tier fanout merged them to one before timing
invalidated_benchmark.resolution: no timing row was used; the normative QG-6 matrix supplied the same-worker before/after evidence

ubs.reason: UBS Rust scans launch hidden local Cargo subchecks, which are inadmissible under the campaign's strict remote-only Cargo policy.

agent_mail.detail: The Agent Mail corruption circuit breaker remained open. No unauthorized repair was attempted; Git, Beads, and the isolated worktree remained authoritative.

remote_only.note: Every authoritative Cargo command ran through RCH with RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1. Strict routing failures were surfaced and never replaced by local Cargo.
